phase3_findings.description: R4 has no VERIFIED positive control; the _permitted_elsewhere/VERIFIED arm is dead in the suite, so a mutant forcing R4 always-STALE ships green (false-positive Important findings on legit operator deny-absolutes).

fix_decisions.evidence: Over-grade calibration gate (single-source pr-test-analyzer, an empirical over-grader). Evaluated the observable fail-direction: the missing control fails OPEN — a regression making R4 always-STALE ships GREEN and R4 gates at 'important', so the false-positive blast radius is real. This is a genuine coverage hole (repo guard-class 3 / vacuous-guard class), not a fail-closed/diagnostic-only over-grade. Severity re-affirmed at Important; promoted and fixed.
